creator: Trond.Endrestol@ximalas.info
text:
Created attachment 170477
Quick fix for /usr/local/include/tddl.h from emulators/tpm-emulator

emulators/tpm-emulator and security/trousers don't agree on the prototypes for Tddli_SetCapability() and Tddli_PowerManagementControl(). While far from ideal, the attached patch let us move on until something permanent is available.
